title: Pooch & Mutt - Health & Digestion, Complete Dry Dog Food (Grain Free), Salmon and Sweet Potato, 10kg
features: Premium, grain free complete dry dog food
To help dogs with poor or sensitive digestion
Includes prebiotics to aid the balance of good bacteria
Free from Grain, Cereal , Gluten, GM produce, Artificial flavours, colours and preservatives
Fresh drinking water should be available at all times
